column1: # Format: CSV with header row. One sample per line.
# Use this for batch runs; single-sample runs can use config.yaml directly.
#   sample        - output directory name for this Cell Ranger run
#   fastqs        - directory containing FASTQ files for this sample
#   transcriptome - path to Cell Ranger-compatible reference transcriptome
#   sample_name   - sample name matching FASTQ filename prefix
#                   defaults to value of 'sample' if omitted
#   create_bam    - true/false; required true for Cell Ranger 10+ (default: true)
# Optional: Titan integration (append to each row; leave blank if unused)
